seepeople.title: See People
seepeople.description: Every person in your community has a story. CROS helps you see them — truly see them — and respond with intention.

growTogether.title: Grow Together
growTogether.description: Relationships aren't transactions. They unfold over time. CROS grows with you, season by season.

communityIntelligence.title: Community Intelligence
communityIntelligence.description: Know what's happening in your community. Surface needs, connect resources, and track the health of your relational network.

nriPanel.title: NRI, Not AI
nriPanel.subtitle: Natural Relational Intelligence
nriPanel.description: Most platforms use AI to automate relationships. CROS uses NRI — Natural Relational Intelligence — to illuminate them. The NRI Companion doesn't replace your judgment. It deepens your attention.

comparison.nriPoint1: Reminds you why this person matters

pricing.subtitle: Simple, honest pricing for those who serve.

core.description: Everything you need to see your people and grow your community.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes — start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
faq.a2: Absolutely. No contracts, no cancellation fees.
faq.a3: Your data is yours. We never sell it, share it, or use it for advertising. Ever.
faq.q4: Do the Latin module names mean it's only for Catholic communities?
faq.a4: Not at all. CROS is designed for anyone who cares for others — mentors, recovery coaches, advocates, community organizers, and yes, parish leaders too.

cta.final: Your community is waiting. Start seeing people today.

gardenerNoteModal.title: A Note from the First Gardener
gardenerNoteModal.srDescription: A personal reflection on the origins of CROS.
gardenerNoteModal.p1: I built CROS slowly — while serving in ministry, recovery spaces, nonprofit outreach, and creative work.
gardenerNoteModal.p2: It exists because humans deserve more than databases and thoughtless automation.
gardenerNoteModal.p3: Now it grows beyond me — through every organization that chooses to tend it.
gardenerNoteModal.footnote: Technology shaped by presence, not disruption.

featuresPage.headline: A system that remembers people.
featuresPage.subheadline: Most platforms track transactions. {{appName}}™ remembers relationships. Where traditional AI analyzes data, NRI™ learns from human experience. Together, they create a system that helps organizations grow without losing their humanity.

core.heading: Relationship Memory
core.body: The core of {{appName}}™ — everything your team needs to remember people well.

intelligence.heading: Narrative Relational Intelligence
intelligence.body: AI that assists the system — but the intelligence belongs to the human relationships.

modules.heading: Purpose-built for community work
modules.body: Every module was shaped by real organizations doing real relationship work.

governance.heading: Shared Intelligence
governance.body: Every CROS community participates in a shared intelligence capacity. Instead of charging per action, CROS protects calm work with predictable, human-scaled limits.

relationshipMemory.title: Relationship Memory
relationshipMemory.desc: Reflections, journey chapters, and email history create a living record of every relationship.

peoplePartners.title: People & Partners
peoplePartners.desc: Track individuals and organizations as relationships — not leads in a pipeline.

journeyChapters.title: Journey Chapters
journeyChapters.desc: Visualize where each partnership is in its story — from first meeting to sustained collaboration.

eventsCalendar.title: Events & Calendar
eventsCalendar.desc: Community events, meetings, and scheduled activities — all in one place.

reflections.title: Reflections
reflections.desc: Private, sacred space for capturing what you noticed, felt, and learned.

visits.title: Visits
visits.desc: Simplified mobile-first visit tracking — log a visit in under 60 seconds.

nri.title: NRI™ (Neary)
nri.desc: Narrative Relational Intelligence — AI that assists without replacing the human voice.

signum.title: Signum™
signum.desc: Tenant-aware discovery guided by shared intelligence capacity.

testimonium.title: Testimonium™
testimonium.desc: Narrative storytelling and impact insights woven from your daily relationship work.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.desc: Discovery learns from your mission without overwhelming your team.

communio.title: Communio™
communio.desc: Public profiles help others discover you — without exposing private data. Opt-in narrative sharing between organizations.

relatioCampaigns.title: Relatio Campaigns™
relatioCampaigns.desc: Build and send relationship-first email campaigns grounded in real context.

voluntarium.title: Voluntārium™
voluntarium.desc: Volunteer management, hours tracking, and recognition — community as first-class citizens.

provisio.title: Prōvīsiō™
provisio.desc: Technology provision requests and order tracking for the communities you serve.

impulsus.title: Impulsus™
impulsus.desc: A private impact scrapbook journal — your team's sacred space for capturing stories.

relatioMarketplace.title: Relatio™ Marketplace
relatioMarketplace.desc: Integration bridges and migration tools — imported data strengthens discovery signals, turning external systems into living context.

comparePage.headline:
Most systems organize data.
CROS™ remembers relationships.
comparePage.subheadline: For decades, CRMs helped organizations track activity — but rarely helped them understand the human story behind it. CROS™ was built differently.

convergeSection.heading: Where We Converge — and Where We Diverge
convergeSection.body: Most modern platforms can store contacts, log activity, and track tasks. That's the convergence. The divergence is whether the system helps your team remember the human story — and notice what's changing in the community you serve.

convergeCard.heading: Converge
convergeCard.body: Contact records, tasks, basic tracking — the essentials.

divergeCard.heading: Diverge
divergeCard.body: Relationship memory, community awareness, narrative intelligence — the human layer.

top10.heading: CROS™ vs 10 Leading Platforms
top10.subheading: Most CRMs assume you're at a desk. CROS™ assumes you're with people.

migrationSection.heading: Leaving your old system shouldn't be a project.
migrationSection.body: We built Relatio™ bridges so teams can migrate the relationship spine — organizations, people, tasks, and interaction history — without bringing over donor accounting complexity.
migrationSection.footnote: We migrate relationship history — not donations.

humanitySection.heading: Where Traditional Systems Lose the Story
humanitySection.p1: Traditional platforms were designed to manage transactions — not relationships.
humanitySection.p2: They record emails sent, donations logged, campaigns opened.
humanitySection.p3: But they rarely answer: What did we notice? What changed? Who needed us most?
humanitySection.p4: CROS™ doesn't replace technology. It restores the human layer that technology quietly removed.
humanitySection.p5: Instead of forcing people into spreadsheets, CROS™ helps your team remember why those relationships mattered in the first place.

intelligenceSection.heading: Intelligence, Redefined
intelligenceSection.subheading: Not all intelligence is created equal.

unifiedSection.heading: One system · every layer
unifiedSection.unifierNote: CROS™ unifies these without losing the human story.

finalCta.heading: Ready to move beyond the spreadsheet?
finalCta.subheading: Join organizations choosing relationships over records.

legacyCrm.title: Legacy CRM Stack
legacyCrm.body: Complex pipelines, rigid schemas, and reporting built for sales teams — not mission-driven organizations.

emailFirst.title: Email-First Platforms
emailFirst.body: Subscriber-focused systems that track opens and clicks — but never capture the human story behind the outreach.

volunteerPlatforms.title: Volunteer Platforms
volunteerPlatforms.body: Scheduling tools that coordinate shifts — without narrative context about the people who show up.

gate.title: Relatio Marketplace
gate.description: Available in CROS Bridge. Connect your CROS workspace to CRMs, communication tools, and community platforms.

relatioMarketplace.companionTooltip: CROS listens alongside your existing system. Nothing is changed — we only observe and generate narrative signals.

landingPage.heroCopy: CROS™ helps teams remember people, notice community shifts, and build a living story of impact — without turning mission into busywork.
landingPage.heroTagline: A Relationship Operating System built on a different ontology — where story guides structure.

rolesSection.heading: What role are you?
rolesSection.subheading: CROS™ adapts to how you serve — whether you lead, walk alongside, or show up in the field.

shepherd.copy: Guide the mission with calm oversight. See relationships unfold across people, communities, and time.

companion.copy: Walk alongside others. Remember conversations, follow up with care, and never lose the thread.

visitor.copy: Show up where life happens. Speak a voice note. Your presence becomes the record.

nervousSystem.label: NERVOUS SYSTEM
nervousSystem.name: You
nervousSystem.body: The system only lives when you do. Every reflection, conversation, and moment of presence is the signal that gives CROS™ its meaning.

reflectionCard.heading: Not sure if you need new software?
reflectionCard.subheading: Before comparing features, try this reflection.

technologyCard.heading:
Technology should carry the weight.
Humans carry the meaning.

narrativeCards.heading: What if your daily work felt different?

imagine.heading: Imagine
imagine.body: Imagine a system that walks alongside your team — instead of adding to the burden.
imagine.item1: Imagine knowing who needs care today
imagine.item2: Imagine fewer systems pulling you apart
imagine.item3: Imagine your work feeling whole again

archetypesSection.heading: Built for missions like yours
archetypesSection.subheading: Choose your archetype. CROS™ adapts to how you serve.

beyondCrmSection.heading: Why Organizations Are Moving Beyond Traditional CRMs
beyondCrmSection.body: Traditional systems track activity. CROS™ remembers relationships — and the human stories that hold them together.

privacySection.heading: Privacy by design
privacySection.body: Reflections stay private. Email boundaries are strict. Admins see health, not content.

integrationsSection.heading: Connects to the tools you already use
integrationsSection.subheading: 30+ integrations — CRMs, church management systems, nonprofit platforms, and WordPress.

intelligenceSection.heading: Intelligence, governed with intention.
intelligenceSection.p1: CROS includes a shared intelligence capacity — not to replace human judgment, but to help communities notice what might otherwise be missed.
intelligenceSection.p2: Instead of unlimited automation, we believe in discernment. Your community shares a living AI capacity that grows alongside your mission, guided by gentle safeguards and transparent stewardship.
intelligenceSection.bullet2: Shared capacity shaped by your mission
intelligenceSection.bullet3: AI that listens before it speaks
intelligenceSection.cta: See how intelligence flows through CROS

finalCta.heading: Ready to remember people well?
finalCta.subheading: No donor management. No urgency dashboards. Just human relationships, cared for.

rolesPage.heroSubheading: CROS™ adapts to how you serve people — whether you lead, walk alongside, or show up in the field.

rolePathwayPage.ctaBody: Begin your journey with CROS™ and let the system shape itself around how you already serve.

contactPage.heading: Get started now
contactPage.subheading: Tell us about your organization and we'll set up your CROS™ workspace.
contactPage.rateLimitError: Please wait a moment before submitting again.
contactPage.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contactPage.successBody: We've received your request and will reach out soon. We're excited to learn about your mission.

shepherd.title: Shepherd
shepherd.identity: You carry the vision and hold the story of your community.

bullets.whatYouDo: Guide the mission, nurture long-term relationships, and notice patterns across people and time.
bullets.whatYouSee: Relationship journeys, narrative signals, community health — all in a calm, overview format.
bullets.whatYouAvoid: Alert fatigue, pipeline pressure, and dashboards that demand urgency.

companion.title: Companion
companion.identity: You walk alongside people, keeping the thread of care unbroken.

bullets.whatYouDo: Follow up on conversations, journal reflections, manage day-to-day tasks that emerge from relationships.
bullets.whatYouSee: Simple next steps, email-linked tasks, reflections, and events — organized around the people you serve.
bullets.whatYouAvoid: Complex analytics, corporate KPIs, and anything that feels like surveillance.

visitor.title: Visitor
visitor.identity: You show up where life happens — and your presence becomes the record.

bullets.whatYouDo: Visit homes, events, and neighborhoods. Speak a voice note. Done.
bullets.whatYouSee: A simple, mobile-first screen. No forms. No typing required. Just show up and speak.
bullets.whatYouAvoid: Complexity, long forms, desktop-only workflows, and anything that slows down presence.

steward.title: Steward
steward.identity: You set up the workspace and tend to the tools your team needs.

bullets.whatYouDo: Configure CROS™, invite team members, manage integrations, and ensure the workspace serves the mission.
bullets.whatYouSee: Admin console, activation checklist, team readiness, and integration status.
bullets.whatYouAvoid: Doing everything yourself. Once setup is done, CROS™ runs itself.

roleDeepPage.teamFitHeading: How this fits into your team

shepherd.heroBody: Shepherds carry the vision. You see the whole arc of relationships — across people, communities, and seasons — and guide the mission with calm confidence.
shepherd.teamFitBody: The Shepherd experience is designed for executive directors, pastors, program leaders, and anyone who holds the long view. Your Companions handle the daily rhythm. Your Visitors bring the field presence. Together, the full story emerges.

companion.heroBody: Companions walk alongside people. You remember conversations, follow up with care, and make sure no one falls through the cracks — not because of a system, but because you noticed.
companion.teamFitBody: The Companion experience is designed for case workers, outreach staff, program coordinators, and anyone who does the daily work of caring. Your Shepherds hold the long view. Your Visitors extend presence into the field. You keep the thread alive.

visitor.heroBody: Visitors show up where life happens — homes, events, neighborhoods. Your presence is the most important thing you bring. CROS™ makes sure it's remembered.
visitor.voiceNoteTranscript: "Visited the Johnsons. Kids are doing well in school. Marcus mentioned he's looking for part-time work. Maria asked about the food pantry schedule. They seemed lighter today."
visitor.teamFitBody: The Visitor experience is designed for volunteers, home visitors, outreach workers, and community elders. You don't need to learn the whole system. Your Shepherds and Companions handle the bigger picture — you bring the human presence that makes everything meaningful.

steward.heroBody: Stewards are workspace caretakers. You set up the environment, invite the team, and ensure CROS™ serves your mission — then you step back and let the roles do their work.
steward.teamFitBody: A Steward often wears another hat too — Shepherd or Companion. The Steward role is about the workspace itself: setup, invitations, integrations, and readiness. Once your team is configured, CROS™ runs itself.

whyCrosPage.heroBody: Because organizations that serve people deserve technology that remembers them.
